label: Threats generator params
description: Parameters that control the ThreatsGenerator storyteller comp: which threats to include, timing window, and point floor.

allowedThreats.label: Allowed threats
allowedThreats.description: Which threat categories are generated. Flags enum; combine with commas.

onDays.label: On days
onDays.description: Duration in days of the active threat phase.

offDays.label: Off days
offDays.description: Duration in days of the quiet phase.

numIncidentsRange.label: Num incidents range
numIncidentsRange.description: Number of incidents per active phase, sampled from this range.

minThreatPoints.label: Min threat points
minThreatPoints.description: Minimum threat points for generated incidents.
